name: ACE FlowSmith - Pattern Catalog (the 'map')
description: Registry of reusable IBM ACE integration patterns. FlowSmith uses this map to discover the right reusable template for a functional requirement, then instantiates it with organisation-specific tokens.

tokens.NDMNM: NDM dataset name (REFPGN/INFUID) - only for some PUB/SUB patterns

patterns.title: PTP File-to-File
patterns.description: Point-to-point batch flow. Reads files from an input directory, resets the content descriptor and routes file-to-file via the ED6 batch fileIn/fileOut connector subflows.

patterns.title: PUB Publisher (File -> MQ)
patterns.description: Publisher batch flow. Reads files, publishes onto an ESB MQ queue via the ED6 pub_file_connector subflow. Generates embedded MQ queue definitions.

patterns.title: SUB Subscriber (Online publishing)
patterns.description: Subscriber batch flow tuned for ONLINE publishing. Consumes from MQ, detects last message in group (isLastMsgGroup) and writes files. Use when the upstream publisher emits messages online/continuously.

patterns.title: SUB Subscriber (Batch publishing)
patterns.description: Subscriber batch flow tuned for BATCH publishing. Consumes from MQ and uses an IsTrigger compute (Adapter_IsTrigger) to fire only on the last message of a batch group. Use when the upstream publisher sends grouped/batched messages.
